description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy to test with multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9) on ubuntu-latest. For each version, check out the code, set up Python, install GDAL binaries, update pip, install poetry and tox, and run tests with tox. Upload coverage artifacts. Additionally, create a separate job to combine coverage reports from all test jobs and upload to Coveralls.
